overall.description: First-person driving footage from a cyberpunk video game, navigating through heavy rain at night. The vehicle follows a truck through industrial outskirts, past a massive neon-lit geodesic dome, through graffiti-covered tunnels, and into vibrant neon-lit commercial districts with atmospheric fog and wet reflective roads.

rain-soaked asphalt road with reflective wet surface

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rainy industrial outskirts area at night, following a truck ahead. The dashboard interior is visible with illuminated controls, while industrial warehouses and power lines pass by outside.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a massive geodesic dome structure with green neon lighting on the right, then entering a concrete tunnel. The industrial buildings give way to the tunnel entrance as the vehicle follows the truck into the underpass.

segments.scene_description: Driving deeper into the urban district with mixed green and blue neon signage. The palm trees shift to the right side as the road curves, passing various urban buildings while maintaining distance from the truck ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rainy industrial wasteland that gradually descends into a confined, graffiti-strewn underpass. It begins within the illuminated interior of a vehicle, following a truck past dark warehouses and power lines under a heavy nocturnal downpour. As the vehicle advances, the industrial landscape opens up to reveal a massive geodesic dome glowing with green neon light on the right before the road narrows toward a concrete entrance. The scene then shifts from the open night air into the oppressive enclosure of a tunnel, where the lighting becomes artificial and the walls are layered with colorful graffiti. The camera continues its steady pursuit of the truck, moving deeper into the dark, concrete corridor.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle emerges from a dark tunnel into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins by breaking into the open air, where the environment is immediately saturated with pink and purple neon signs and palm trees lining the wet, reflective streets. As the vehicle follows the truck deeper into the urban sprawl, the color palette shifts from warm purples to a mix of cool green and blue signage. The scene then curves along the road, causing the palm trees to shift to the right as the camera passes a succession of illuminated urban buildings while maintaining a steady distance from the truck ahead.
